title: [Bug]: `union all` 不同的类型时，`to_base64(NULL)` 有时会得到错误的结果
description: master分支版本，`union all` 不同的类型时，`to_base64(NULL)` 有时会得到错误的结果
poc: CREATE RESOURCE UNIT 4c7g MAX_CPU 4, MIN_CPU 4, MEMORY_SIZE '7G';
create resource pool pool_test unit='4c7g', unit_num=1, zone_list=('zone1' ,'zone2', 'zone3');
create tenant test resource_pool_list=('pool_test'), primary_zone='RANDOM',comment 'test tenant', charset='utf8' set ob_tcp_invited_nodes='%', recyclebin=OFF, ob_query_timeout=5000000;
key_bug_features: `union all` with different types causing `to_base64(NULL)` error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), data BLOB, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, data) VALUES (1, 'test1', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, data) VALUES (2, 'test2', TO_BASE64('sample data'));
SELECT TO_BASE64(NULL) AS base64_null FROM test_table WHERE id = 1 UNION ALL SELECT TO_BASE64(data) FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL) UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS id, NULL AS name, NULL AS data;
